series_metadata.series_description: Each custody agreement signed by the Treasurer of State on behalf of the custodial funds is accompanied by an operating procedures manual. This manual sets forth the various procedures that each party to the contractual relationship is to follow and is an exhibit that is incorporated into the relevant custody agreement. See also TOS Agency Series Number LEG-04 (Series Authorization Number 10900503) which discusses retention of contracts.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain two years after the expiration of the contract to which the operating procedures pertain. ; Electronic: Retain two years after the expiration of the contract to which the operating procedures pertain., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
